name: Johnson Health Tech. Co., Ltd.
summary: Johnson Health Tech. Co., Ltd. provides sports and fitness equipment in Asia and internationally. The company offers electric treadmills, indoor exercise bikes/flywheels, elliptical training products, and weight training/rowing equipment; electric massage chairs, and instep shoulder and neck massage equipment; and fitness accessories, bar/dumbells, yoga supplies, gloves/boxing products, and protective/weight gears. It also provides exercise products, including fitness and bicycle series, marathon products, and GPS sports watch, as well as polar accessories. The company offers its products principally under the Matrix, Vision, and Horizon brand names primarily through stores. Johnson Health Tech. Co., Ltd. was founded in 1975 and is based in Taichung City, Taiwan.
